case_title: PATEL, PRABHA vs. FILER, STEVEN et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, PRABHA AS TO DEFENDANT FILER, STEVEN DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED

2:10PM DEPT #1 JUDGE WICK, C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ALL PARTIES PRESENT. JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF FOR POSSESSION OF PREMISES AGAINST THE DEFENDANT. DEFT TO VACATE PREMISES BY 12:00 NOON 9/17/93. IF DEFT VACATES THE PREMISES ON OR BEFORE 12:0OPM 9/17/93 PLAINTIFF SHALL WAIVE ALL RENTS, DAMAGES AND COSTS. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO VACATE PLAINTIFF SHALL HAVE JUDGMENT AGAINST THE DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNT OF $275.00 PLUS COST AND WRIT MAY BE ISSUED IMMEDIATE- LY. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
